notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Royce Lewis reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. Kody Clemens to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler reaches on a fielder's choice. Royce Lewis to 2nd. Royce Lewis advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Maikel Garcia.

notableEvents.label: Royce Lewis reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Royce Lewis reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. Kody Clemens to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach flies out to left fielder Isaac Collins.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach doubles (10) on a fly ball to left fielder Isaac Collins.

notableEvents.label: Victor Caratini pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Victor Caratini singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Lane Thomas, deflected by pitcher Lucas Erceg. Trevor Larnach scores.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Gray pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Gray singles on a line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins. Victor Caratini to 2nd.
